subject: App Crash Report
body: Hi team, after upgrading to version 3.0.1 the app crashes when I tap Weekly Planner. Device: Pixel 7. OS: Android 15. Steps: open app, tap Planner, choose Weekly view, crash.

subject: Feature Request: Dark Mode
body: Hello, I use the app at night and would like dark mode. A quick toggle in settings would help a lot.

subject: Data Loss Problem
body: My completed tasks disappeared after sync. iPhone 15, iOS 18.3, app 3.0.1. It happened after switching from Wi-Fi to mobile data.

subject: Suggestion for Improvement
body: Could you add export to CSV for task history? I need it for monthly reporting.

subject: Thank you
body: Your support team helped me recover my list quickly. Great service.

subject: Login Issue
body: I cannot login with Google sign-in. It loops back to the login screen. Samsung S22, Android 14.

subject: App is too slow
body: The app opens slowly and takes too long to load my dashboard. Please improve performance.
